creator: petteri.valkonen@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 222721
Patch to add jsonnetfmt binary to v0.15.0 package

The 'jsonnet fmt' subcommand was moved to its own binary in v0.13.0 (see: https://github.com/google/jsonnet/releases/tag/v0.13.0). The attached patch adds the binary to the v0.15.0 package.
